context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified the change-plan fix using cancel+recreate approach. Key points: (1) The change-plan endpoint now cancels the old subscription and creates a new one instead of using swap_plan. This avoids the 'pending action' issue that blocked future swaps. (2) Auto-sync on startup sorts ACTIVE subscriptions first and tracks which emails already have active subs to prevent overwriting new active sub IDs with old cancelled ones. (3) The Cancel button in subscription section now says 'Close' when plan options are expanded (UX fix). (4) Test user xaviersteverson@gmail.com is on weekly plan with ACTIVE status. (5) Batch mode completely removed from App.js.
